records.question: Which students have the email address lisette.brekke@example.net and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'lisette.brekke@example.net' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join addresses on students.address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(students.email_address) = 'lisette.brekke@example.net' and lower(addresses.country) = 'usa' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find students whose email_address matches 'lisette.brekke@example.net' and whose address is in the USA. This requires joining Students with Addresses using address_id and filtering on both email_address and country.

records.question: What students have the email address eolson@example.com and are linked through their address to a teacher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN teachers ON addresses.address_id = teachers.address_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'eolson@example.com'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join teachers on students.address_id = teachers.address_id where lower(students.email_address) = 'eolson@example.com' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find students with the specified email address and who share an address with at least one teacher. We'll join Students and Teachers on address_id and filter by the email address.

records.question: Who are the students named Rhea Gardner Bergnaum with the email kkirlin@example.org, whose mobile number is 1-751-162-9676x115, who first rented on or after 2017-11-15 04:57:28 and left the university on or after 2018-03-19 12:49:20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
WHERE students.cell_mobile_number = '1-751-162-9676x115' AND students.last_name = 'Bergnaum' AND students.middle_name = 'Gardner' AND students.date_left_university >= '2018-03-19 12:49:20' AND students.email_address = 'kkirlin@example.org' AND students.date_first_rental >= '2017-11-15 04:57:28' AND students.first_name = 'Rhea'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students where lower(first_name) = 'rhea' and lower(middle_name) = 'gardner' and lower(last_name) = 'bergnaum' and lower(email_address) = 'kkirlin@example.org' and cell_mobile_number = '1-751-162-9676x115' and date_first_rental >= '2017-11-15 04:57:28' and date_left_university >= '2018-03-19 12:49:20' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter students by exact first, middle, and last names, email address, cell mobile number, and check that date_first_rental and date_left_university are on or after the specified dates.

records.question: Which students have the last name Fadel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
WHERE students.last_name = 'Fadel'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students where lower(last_name) like '%fadel%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find students whose last_name matches 'Fadel', so we filter the Students table using a case-insensitive like on last_name.

records.question: Who are the students named Christy with the cell number (568)451-0917x3945 who first rented on or after 2018-01-11 19:49:39 and left the university on or after 2018-03-15 01:47:11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
WHERE students.cell_mobile_number = '(568)451-0917x3945' AND students.date_left_university >= '2018-03-15 01:47:11' AND students.first_name = 'Christy' AND students.date_first_rental >= '2018-01-11 19:49:39'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students where lower(first_name) like '%christy%' and cell_mobile_number = '(568)451-0917x3945' and date_first_rental >= '2018-01-11 19:49:39' and date_left_university >= '2018-03-15 01:47:11' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter students whose first_name contains 'christy', cell_mobile_number matches exactly, date_first_rental is on or after '2018-01-11 19:49:39', and date_left_university is on or after '2018-03-15 01:47:11'.

records.question: Which students have the cell mobile number (874)070-9495, email address norwood.howell@example.org, and live at 11940 Pauline Shoals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE students.cell_mobile_number = '(874)070-9495' AND addresses.line_1 = '11940 Pauline Shoals' AND students.email_address = 'norwood.howell@example.org'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join addresses on students.address_id = addresses.address_id where students.cell_mobile_number = '(874)070-9495' and students.email_address = 'norwood.howell@example.org' and lower(addresses.line_1) like '%11940 pauline shoals%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter students by cell_mobile_number and email_address, and join with Addresses to match line_1. All three conditions must be met.

records.question: What students named Rhea Gardner Bergnaum, with the email kkirlin@example.org, living at 3069 Garrison Squares in zip code 748, have a first rental date on or after 2017-11-15 04:57:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_rental >= '2017-11-15 04:57:28' AND students.last_name = 'Bergnaum' AND students.first_name = 'Rhea' AND addresses.line_1 = '3069 Garrison Squares' AND students.middle_name = 'Gardner' AND addresses.zip_postcode = '748' AND students.email_address = 'kkirlin@example.org'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join addresses on students.address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(students.first_name) = 'rhea' and lower(students.middle_name) = 'gardner' and lower(students.last_name) = 'bergnaum' and lower(students.email_address) = 'kkirlin@example.org' and lower(addresses.line_1) like '%3069 garrison squares%' and lower(addresses.zip_postcode) like '%748%' and students.date_first_rental >= '2017-11-15 04:57:28' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join Students with Addresses to filter by address details, and filter Students by full name, email, and first rental date. We use exact matches for names and email, and like for address and zip code.

records.question: Which students have the middle name Jerod and also have associated addresses and assessment notes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
WHERE students.middle_name = 'Jerod'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join student_addresses on students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id join assessment_notes on students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id where lower(students.middle_name) = 'jerod' limit 5;
records.thought: We need students with middle name 'Jerod', who have at least one associated address and at least one assessment note. We'll join Students with Student_Addresses and Assessment_Notes, and filter by middle_name.

records.question: Which students with the last name Gottlieb and email address dicki.kathryne@example.org lived in New Annabellefort on or before 2017-03-29 18:22:55 and left the university on or before 2018-03-18 16:07:42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org' AND students.last_name = 'Gottlieb' AND student_addresses.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55' AND addresses.city = 'New Annabellefort' AND students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join student_addresses on students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id join addresses on student_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(students.last_name) = 'gottlieb' and lower(students.email_address) = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org' and lower(addresses.city) = 'new annabellefort' and (student_addresses.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55' or (student_addresses.date_address_from is null and student_addresses.date_address_to <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55')) and students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find students with the specified last name and email, who lived in New Annabellefort on or before the given date (using Student_Addresses and Addresses), and who left the university on or before the specified date.

records.question: Which students named Emma Frederic Rohan live in Unachester, Wisconsin, USA, and rented for the first time on or after 2017-12-05 15:20:04?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE students.last_name = 'Rohan' AND students.first_name = 'Emma' AND students.middle_name = 'Frederic' AND addresses.city = 'Unachester' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Wisconsin' AND students.date_first_rental >= '2017-12-05 15:20:04'
records.pred_sql: select students.student_id from students join addresses on students.address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(students.first_name) = 'emma' and lower(students.middle_name) = 'frederic' and lower(students.last_name) = 'rohan' and lower(addresses.city) = 'unachester' and lower(addresses.state_province_county) = 'wisconsin' and lower(addresses.country) = 'usa' and students.date_first_rental >= '2017-12-05 15:20:04' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter students by full name, join with Addresses to check city, state, and country, and filter by date_first_rental on or after the given date.
